'''''Hammer''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
The ''Hammer'' was dispatched to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Outpost D-34|D-34]] in the [[Javin system/Legends|Javin system]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], to bring relief to the forces there, who had come under attack by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ships, allied with the local [[Mugaari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

The [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]'' later arrived in the system to relieve the ''Hammer'', which remained in the area to assist D-34 in dealing with the sudden increase in enemy activity in the sector.

It was later present in the area of [[Depot XLS]] providing support in case the rebels should be too tough to be contained.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
